page.title: Preset Gallery
page.subtitle: Browse and launch pre-built forecast configurations

search.ariaLabel: Search presets by name, description or tag

empty.title: No presets found
empty.description: No published presets are available yet.
empty.filteredDescription: Try clearing the search or selecting a different category or difficulty.

error.title: Could not load presets
error.description: There was a problem fetching the preset gallery. Please try again later.

rename.title: Rename Preset
rename.description: Update the title and comments for this preset.

empty.title: No saved presets yet
empty.description: Save a configuration from the Fable Builder to see it here.

section.title: Getting Started Presets
section.subtitle: Choose how to start your forecast configuration

startFromScratch.title: Start from Scratch
startFromScratch.description: Build a forecast from scratch with full control over every parameter.

unavailable.title: Presets unavailable
unavailable.description: Could not load featured presets. Start from scratch or try again later.

page.title: Manage Presets
page.description: Create, publish, and delete high-level forecast presets.

empty.title: No presets yet
empty.description: Create your first preset to get started.

delete.title: Delete Preset
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.createSubtitle: Fill in the details below to create a new high-level forecast preset.

sections.basicInfoDesc: The name and description shown to users in the preset gallery.
sections.metadataDesc: Category, difficulty, icon and tags used for filtering and display.
sections.parametersDesc: Define the configurable inputs users will see in the preset wizard.
sections.templateDesc: The raw Fable Builder JSON template that will be instantiated when a user runs this preset.

fields.name: Name
fields.nameHint: Short, descriptive title shown in the gallery (max 120 characters).
fields.descriptionHint: One or two sentences summarising what this preset does.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Runs a global temperature forecast using ERA5 data.
fields.longDescriptionHint: Optional extended description shown on the preset detail page. Supports plain text.
fields.longDescriptionPlaceholder: Provide additional context, usage notes, or expected outputs…
fields.categoryHint: Free-form category string. Start typing to see existing categories.
fields.iconHint: Lucide icon name displayed next to the preset title.
fields.tagsHint: Press Enter or comma to add a tag. Tags help users filter presets.
fields.publishedHint: Published presets are visible to all users in the gallery.

parameters.empty: No parameters defined. Add one below.

fields.label: Label
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. The first date of the forecast period.

template.hint: Paste or edit the Fable Builder JSON template. Use the Format button to pretty-print.

preview.disabledHint: Preview is only available for intermediate/advanced presets with at least one parameter.

validation.templateInvalidJson: Builder template must be valid JSON.
validation.parametersHaveErrors: One or more parameters have missing required fields.

toast.saveError: Failed to save preset. Please try again.

wizard.title: Configure: {{name}}
wizard.subtitle: Customise the preset parameters before running.

intermediate.name: Intermediate
intermediate.hint: Configure a few parameters, then run immediately.

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.hint: Full editor access — customise every detail before running.

wizard.runForecastDisabledHint: Fill in all required parameters to run the forecast.
wizard.previewModeHint: Preview only — save the preset to enable this action.

review.title: Review Configuration
review.description: Check the preset details before proceeding.

success.title: Forecast submitted
success.description: Your forecast job has been queued successfully.

error.title: Instantiation failed
error.description: Could not configure the preset. Please try again.
